title: What BOQ Software Should Do: A Contractor Checklist
metaTitle: What BOQ Software Should Do: A Contractor Checklist
metaDescription: Good BOQ software does not just import an Excel sheet. It tracks rate revisions, budget vs actual, and item level cost.
author: SiteFlow Editorial Team
body:
The Bill of Quantities (BOQ) is the basis for good planning and budgeting in construction.  It lists all the materials, activities, and resources that a project needs. However, when done by hand, it often leads to mistakes in calculations, missing entries, and mismatched versions.  SiteFlow‘s BOQ Software for Construction fixes these problems by digitizing the whole process and keeping all project data in one place. It tells you what BOQ software should do

Why BOQ Software for Construction Matter?

What BOQ software should do and how a software solves it?

1. Create and Manage Digital BOQs

With SiteFlow, generating, uploading, and managing BOQ is way easier than ever before. It stays secure in the app under the BOQ section.  You can have access to them anytime, anywhere. If there is any mistake in a BOQ, you can even edit or delete it. 

2. Link BOQ Items with Site Progress

SiteFlow integrates each site’s work to their billing cycle right away. It helps in linking BOQ and DPR so that cost tracking remains visible and real. This makes sure that payments are only made for work that has been approved and that the project’s cost records are always correct and up to date.

3. Prevent Cost Overruns

Budgets don’t always go as anticipated, but with SiteFlow you can discover the holes early.  The software compares planned budgets with actual spending, helping you prevent cost overruns before they happen.

4. Streamline Procurement 

With the procurement feature you can generate orders, manage contracts, and budgeting. This feature involves finding suppliers, settling contracts, maintaining vendor relations, and making sure that products or services are delivered on schedule. 

5. Access Anytime, from Anywhere

With SiteFlow, BOQs are synced across devices. You can generate, share, edit, and check status of any BOQ on the go. Whether you are on site or not, with mobile and laptop accessibility, you can access and take updates from anywhere, anytime. 

Benefits of BOQ Software for Construction

Conclusion

SiteFlow is made just for people who work in construction. It links BOQ management to important project tasks including buying materials, billing, and keeping track of materials.  With this interface, contractors may keep track of all costs, from the first estimate to the end of the project, all in one place.

Also Read: Converting BOQ to Bill of Materials Without Errors

FAQs

1. What is BOQ software in construction?

BOQ (Bill of Quantities) software helps contractors prepare, manage, and update detailed quantity and cost estimates for construction projects. It replaces manual spreadsheets with an organized digital system that improves accuracy and control.

2. How does SiteFlow’s BOQ Software help contractors?

SiteFlow allows contractors to create BOQs, link them to real-time project progress, and manage all revisions in one place. It connects estimation, procurement, and billing so that costs and quantities always stay aligned.

3. Can SiteFlow track cost deviations from the BOQ?

Yes. SiteFlow provides dashboards that show differences between estimated and actual values. This helps project managers identify overruns early and take corrective action before costs escalate.
